MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. THOMAS A. CIFARELLI, Esq. of The Cifarelli Law Firm (Tel: 949-502-8600) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Matter discussed. Upon inquiry by plaintiff's counsel, the Court states plaintiff's amended complaint must be filed in accordance with the statutory deadline.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's motion to strike is granted with leave to amend for numbers (1)-(8) and (13). Defendant's motion to strike is denied for numbers (9)-(12).

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
